objective: Close F-0046 by replacing the backend-admin creator's fixed first-100 organization snapshot with an explicit, server-searched and paginated active-organization picker. The picker must expose loading, empty and error states, ignore stale rapid-search responses, require an explicit organization selection, and preserve the repository's fail-closed active-organization recheck without changing roles, permissions, schema or API semantics.
blockedFiles: real database writes, Provider calls, external services, deployment, PR or force-push

authoritativeChainEvidence.uiApi: AdminOpsManagement creates organization-bound admin accounts and already calls GET /api/v1/organizations; the fixed page=1/pageSize=100 snapshot is the confirmed F-0046 failure boundary.
authoritativeChainEvidence.handlerService: admin-organization-org-auth-runtime already parses page, pageSize, keyword and status and returns a paginated envelope; no server contract change is required.
authoritativeChainEvidence.repositorySchema: admin-organization-org-auth-runtime-repository already filters and paginates the organization query, while admin-flow-runtime-repository rechecks organization.status=active during account creation.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: A new focused UI test covers the 101st organization through search, status=active filtering, pagination, stale rapid-search responses, explicit selection, and empty/error states; existing admin UI and server regression suites remain unchanged.
authoritativeChainEvidence.nonClaims: No role, permission, entitlement, schema, migration, database execution, API capability, dependency, Provider, external service or mechanism change.
